articles.author: Lucas Ropek
articles.title: Google’s Dreambeans, its weirdest-named AI tool to date, will turn your life into a cartoon - TechCrunch
articles.description: Dreambeans is a curated list of AI-illustrated "stories" culled from the personal data in your Google account.
articles.content:
Google Labs, the tech giant’s team devoted to experimental product design, has launched a new AI-fueled app for iOS and Android that will quite literally animate your life. 
Behold, Dreambeans. Why … [+2955 chars]
